title: Xano API returns error 500 due to missing user table information
symptom: When attempting to connect to the Xano API, an error 500 occurs with the message 'variable not found'. This prevents successful API calls.
applies_when: User table is incomplete or missing information
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different API integration
root_cause: The error occurs because the Xano API expects certain variables to be present in the user table. If these variables are missing or incomplete, it results in a server error (500) indicating that the required data cannot be found.
fix_steps: Check the user table in Xano for missing fields
Ensure all required fields are populated with valid data
agent_instruction: Verify and complete the user table in Xano before attempting to connect again.
